//: Pins the .NET SDK to 8.0.x for deterministic local + CI builds. The Crestron RMC4 deployment target is .NET 8 (LTS); pinning the SDK to the same major.minor avoids accidentally building against a newer SDK whose analyzer set differs from what's audited.
//rollForward: latestFeature lets us roll forward 8.0.100 -> 8.0.125 (developer machine) or 8.0.x (CI runner) but never crosses into 9.0 or 10.0.
